title: Just Some Texture Changes
description: My Texture pack changes few things including: Low fire, Shield, Gold, Diamond and Netherite helmets, Dark GUI, Animated Totem and Golden Apple and Shield.
body:
### Features
My Texture pack changes few things including: Low fire, Shield, Gold, Diamond and Netherite helmets, Dark GUI, Animated Totem and Golden Apple and Shield.
- - -
### Images
